# Use Rights Policy

AOI separates read-only recommendation from downstream use rights.

Default v0.1 use rights:

- `READ`: allowed
- `RANK`: allowed
- `COMPARE`: allowed
- `QUOTE`: allowed for short source-trace review
- `TRAIN`: blocked by default
- `SHARE`: blocked by default
- `MEMORY`: held by default
- `ACTION`: blocked by default

Generated and sample data cannot grant training, sharing, memory, or action rights. Future verified workflows may define new policy, but Package 6D-S does not.
